debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
⊢ m / 2 = initPart.length

failed_attempts:
have h1 : initPart.length = m / 2 := by
      -- Each agent has exactly one initial call, and each initial call involves two agents.
      -- So the number of initial calls is m / 2.
      have h2 : (S.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c)).length * 2 = m := by
        -- Count the number of agent-initial-call incidences in two ways.
        have h3 : ∑ k : Fin m, v initPart k = 2 * initPart.length := by
          -- Each call contributes 2 to the sum.
          simp [v, List.sum_countP, Nat.mul_comm]
        have h4 : ∑ k : Fin m, v initPart k = m := by
          -- Each agent appears in exactly one initial call.
          have h5 : ∀ k : Fin m, v initPart k = 1 := by
            intro k
            -- By definition of initial call, each agent has exactly one first call.
            -- Since noHo holds, this first call must be in initPart.
            sorry
          simp [h5]
        linarith
      omega
    exact h1
